response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software craftsmanship, testing, and full-stack development, but falls significantly short of the core requirements for this role. Specifically, the position requires 8 years of C++ programming and deep experience in large-scale cloud compute platforms, whereas the candidate has less than a year of professional C++ experience and primarily focuses on Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang in web or application-level contexts.
strengths: Strong advocacy for software craftsmanship, testing (TDD), and CI/CD best practices.
Demonstrated passion for mentorship, leading workshops, and organizing coding dojos.
Extensive overall software engineering experience across a wide variety of stacks and domains.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 8 years of C++ programming experience (only ~7 months at National Instruments).
Experience is heavily skewed towards full-stack and web development rather than low-level cloud compute infrastructure.
Lacks formal technical leadership experience managing priorities and cross-team alignment for platform engineering teams.
